title: Initialize Method
description: Implement the initialize method to set initial state for a class instance.
problemStatement:
Constructor logic! In your `Book` class, define an `initialize` method that takes one argument `title`. Assign this argument to an instance variable `@title`.

**Requirement:** Use the `@` prefix for the instance variable.
hints: The `initialize` method is called automatically when you run `Book.new`.
expectedOutput: Instance variable @title set correctly during initialization
